title: Full Stack Developer Intern
description:
About Us

Innovate. Create. Elevate.
﻿At Vertis, we believe innovation starts with people. We design and deliver exceptional digital solutions that elevate our clients' brands and the experiences they create for their customers. Through technology-driven creativity, we enable meaningful business transformation. Our team is made up of capable, confident, and motivated individuals who collaborate, challenge ideas, and grow together.

About the job
﻿We are looking for a motivated Full Stack Intern to support our development team in building and maintaining web applications. You will gain hands-on experience working with backend technologies (Node.js and/or .NET), front-end frameworks, REST APIs, and cloud platforms while learning from experienced developers.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in developing and maintaining backend services using Node.js and/or .NET.
  • Support building and updating frontend components using modern frameworks.
  • Help integrate frontend interfaces with backend services through APIs.
  • Assist with debugging, testing, and resolving application issues.
  • Collaborate with developers and team members on assigned tasks.
  • Follow coding standards and development best practices.

Requirement and Qualification

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a Diploma or Bachelor's degree in a related field.
  • Basic understanding of frontend and backend development concepts.
  • Familiarity with web technologies or programming languages is a plus.
  • Strong willingness to learn and grow as a developer.
  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work effectively in a team environment.

Our Hiring Process
﻿After submitting your application, our Talent Acquisition team will review your profile. If your skills and experience align with the role, we'll get in touch to discuss the next steps. Please be cautious of recruitment fraud; only engage with emails from our official team that end with @vertis.digital domain.

Vertis is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We believe that diversity of thought, background, and experience drives innovation and success. That's why we are committed to building and nurturing a team that reflects a wide range of perspectives, abilities, identities, and experiences. At Vertis, every voice matters, and together, we achieve more. We appreciate all applications; however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your interest.

The use of artificial intelligence tools, including language models such as ChatGPT, during the interview process is strictly prohibited and will result in the disqualification of your application.

We’re a group of creative thinkers that blend the knowledge across multiple disciplines to create new experiences or products that meet end user and organizational needs.

Vertis Digital was establised to help organisation realise the true value of a digital transformation.
We help organsation unleash their team's full potential and delivery powerful and meaning Digital Experiences for their customers.
